languages.text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, положил жизнь на возвращение своему покалеченному напарнику заменяющих руки имплантов. Излишне увлеченный поисками идеально подходящего аугмента, он впал в техноересь и был уничтожен.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.
languages.original_text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, положил жизнь на возвращение своему покалеченному напарнику заменяющих руки имплантов. Излишне увлеченный поисками идеально подходящего аугмента, он впал в техноересь и был уничтожен.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

languages.text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医長ジェネト・フェレンツは、パートナーの負傷を治すために、義手を取り戻すために命を懸けた。完璧な補完を求めるあまり、彼は技術の異端となり、破壊された。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

traits.locale_text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医長ジェネト・フェレンツは、パートナーの負傷を治すために、義手を取り戻すために命を懸けた。完璧な補完を求めるあまり、彼は技術の異端となり、破壊された。

languages.text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区医务，为了给残疾的同伴带回替换的手臂植入物，不惜献出自己的生命。他对完美植入物的痴迷让他坠入技术异端，最终走向毁灭。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区医务，为了给残疾的同伴带回替换的手臂植入物，不惜献出自己的生命。他对完美植入物的痴迷让他坠入技术异端，最终走向毁灭。

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, risqua sa vie pour rapporter des implants de bras destinés à remplacer ceux de son partenaire estropié. Dans sa quête obsessionnelle de l'augmentation parfaite, il se laissa séduire par la technohérésie et dut être éliminé.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, risqua sa vie pour rapporter des implants de bras destinés à remplacer ceux de son partenaire estropié. Dans sa quête obsessionnelle de l'augmentation parfaite, il se laissa séduire par la technohérésie et dut être éliminé.

languages.text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando de los cirujanos del sector Bionica, dedicó su vida a obtener implantes de brazo para su compañero mutilado. Se obsesionó con la búsqueda del aumento perfecto hasta caer en la tecnoherejía, por lo que fue destruido.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

traits.locale_text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando de los cirujanos del sector Bionica, dedicó su vida a obtener implantes de brazo para su compañero mutilado. Se obsesionó con la búsqueda del aumento perfecto hasta caer en la tecnoherejía, por lo que fue destruido.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika'nın cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Genetör Ferrenz, sakatlanan ortağı için yedek kol implantlarını geri getirmek uğruna canını feda etti. Mükemmel ogmenti bulmayı saplantı yaparak bir tekâfire dönüştü ve yok edildi.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika'nın cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Genetör Ferrenz, sakatlanan ortağı için yedek kol implantlarını geri getirmek uğruna canını feda etti. Mükemmel ogmenti bulmayı saplantı yaparak bir tekâfire dönüştü ve yok edildi.

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz, der für die Chirurgeums des Sektors Bionica verantwortlich war, gab sein Leben bei der Beschaffung von Armimplantaten für seinen verstümmelten Partner. Besessen von der Suche nach der perfekten Augmentation, verfiel er der Tech-Ketzerei und wurde vernichtet.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, laid down his life to bring back replacement arm implants for his maimed partner. Utterly obsessed with finding the perfect augment, he fell into tech-heresy and was destroyed.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz, der für die Chirurgeums des Sektors Bionica verantwortlich war, gab sein Leben bei der Beschaffung von Armimplantaten für seinen verstümmelten Partner. Besessen von der Suche nach der perfekten Augmentation, verfiel er der Tech-Ketzerei und wurde vernichtet.
